title: TotemMod
description:
[EN] Move your Totem of Undying to your offhand with a single key press.

[TR] Tek bir tuşa basarak Totem of Undying’i yan elinize almanızı sağlar.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bzexVSyBN7E" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>[EN]
This mod allows you to instantly move your Totem of Undying to your offhand using a single key press.
Perfect for PvP and dangerous situations where quick reactions are essential.

[TR]
Bu mod, tek bir tuşa basarak Totem of Undying’i hızlıca yan elinize almanızı sağlar.
Hızlı tepki gerektiren PvP ve tehlikeli durumlar için idealdir.
